title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
